objective: Complete integration, performance, migration, recovery, qualification, and release hardening without widening experimental support claims.
in_scope: config, layout and transient image-cache recovery proof
reproducible Phase 0 and candidate performance comparison
Windows, Linux and macOS qualification matrices
security, accessibility, package and release readiness gates
excluded: live native activation probes from doctor
support promotion from SKIP or UNRUN evidence
authority: independently verified Phase 15 design and plan
